expansion.network_status: DNS blocked in current execution surface; collector is resumable when www.kcycle.or.kr resolves.

ensemble_v2.selection_rule: deployable candidate pool re-ranked by expanded val exact; top 20 selected before test reporting

calibration_b.limitation: pool1 is observed only for winning rider payout in this DB join, so the calibration is a winner-sample anchor and is selection-biased.

anomaly_rules.odds_ge_2999: exclude from expansion/evaluation because Kcycle archive uses 2999-like sentinel odds for non-real board cells.
anomaly_rules.board_count_not_210: exclude; seven-rider trifecta must contain exactly 210 ordered non-repeating combinations.
anomaly_rules.duplicate_race: keep first base snapshot; expansion never overwrites base.
